element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Flicky has only side-to-side movement and jump; core mechanics established immediately
Player learns Chirps follow in chain, must be guided to exit; bonus points awarded for collecting multiple in single chain
Basic avoidance threat; disperses collected Chirps on contact, creating risk-reward tension
Added after testing to increase difficulty; same threat model as Tigers

element_introduction_order.element: Throwable items (telephones, flower pots, cups, bottles)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Available on some levels; picked up by walking, thrown by jumping; optional offensive strategy
Behave erratically when dispersed; increase puzzle complexity and enemy encounter consequence
Non-throwable; provide bonus points; create incentive for exploration without combat engagement

element_introduction_order.element: Bonus rounds (catch falling Chirps in net)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Separate mechanic from main platforming; provides score-building opportunity without enemy threat

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting all Chirps and reaching exit
Using throwable items to neutralize threats
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy proximity to Flicky or Chirp chain
Sunglassed Chirps behaving unpredictably after dispersal
Limited throwable items on difficult levels
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty across 48 stages with incremental enemy threat introduction; loops infinitely on increased difficulty after completion

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Throwable items placed on levels; diamonds scattered for optional point collection

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic mechanics and single threat type (Tigers); safe contexts for learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of Iggys, sunglassed Chirps variants, and throwable item strategies; increased enemy density
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex multi-enemy encounters with unpredictable Chirp behavior; resource scarcity of throwable items
notable_spikes: Addition of Iggy enemy type (post-testing implementation)
Introduction of sunglassed Chirps with erratic behavior
Game loop restart at increased difficulty after stage 48

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 48 stages confined to single wraparound screen with Flicky centered; horizontal scrolling follow camera
Background themed as apartment building inspired by developer observation; color variations created visual diversity
Alternating falling-Chirp catch mechanics break main platforming flow; lower-threat score opportunities
